member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Commands.CreateHaulOrderCommand
member.summary: Command that creates a haul designation over a world-space rectangle at a given Z. Executed on the main thread; OrdersManager is thread-safe for enqueue.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Commands.CreateMiningOrderCommand
member.summary: Command that creates a mining designation over a world-space rectangle at a given Z. Executed on the main thread; OrdersManager is thread-safe for enqueue.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Commands.CreateZoneCommand
member.summary: Command to create a new zone with specified cells. Executed on the main thread; ZoneManager is thread-safe for operations.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Commands.DeleteZoneCommand
member.summary: Command to delete a zone entirely.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Commands.UpdateZoneCellsCommand
member.summary: Command to add or remove cells from an existing zone.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.FortressPlayState
member.summary: Fortress play state with simulation loop per UPDATE_ORDER.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateType
member.summary: Game states per GAME_STATE_FLOW.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState
member.summary: Base class for game states.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState.Enter
member.summary: Called when entering this state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState.Exit
member.summary: Called when exiting this state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState.Update(System.Double)
member.summary: Update the state (called each frame).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState.Render
member.summary: Render the state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState.HandleInput
member.summary: Handle input for this state.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager
member.summary: Manages game state transitions and owns core systems per GAME_ARCHITECTURE.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.CurrentState
member.summary: Current game state.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.World
member.summary: Active world (when in fortress play).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.TickScheduler
member.summary: Simulation tick scheduler.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.EnqueueCommand(HumanFortress.Core.Commands.ICommand)
member.summary: Enqueue a simulation command.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.RegisterState(HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameState)
member.summary: Register a state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.TransitionTo(HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateType)
member.summary: Transition to a new state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.ChangeState(HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateType)
member.summary: Convenience method for changing states (used by UI states).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.InitializeWorld(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialize world for fortress play.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.Update(System.Double)
member.summary: Update current state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.Render
member.summary: Render current state.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.HandleInput
member.summary: Handle input for current state.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.GameStates.GameStateManager.SimulationContext
member.summary: Simulation context implementation.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Input.InputBindingsService
member.summary: Loads and provides access to input bindings from content/registries/input.bindings.json. Minimal v1 used by Orders quick menu rendering and key handling.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Input.OrdersRegistryService
member.summary: Loads orders registry to provide display names for orders/tools. File: content/registries/orders.registry.json

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Jobs.HaulJobSystem
member.summary: Executes haul jobs by assigning creatures and moving them along paths. v1 skeleton used in App layer to avoid project cycles.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Jobs.MiningJobSystem
member.summary: Executes mining jobs: move to adjacency, dig for N ticks, then commit terrain change and drops (TODO). Minimal v1.1.1 skeleton: movement + staged progress + TODO for SetTerrain/AddItem via Diff.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Logger
member.summary: Simple file logger that doesn't interfere with SadConsole rendering.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.PhaseTests
member.summary: Comprehensive test suite for all milestone phases.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program
member.summary: Main entry point for the game.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program.MainMenuStateWrapper
member.summary: Main menu state wrapper.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program.FortressPlayState
member.summary: Fortress play state.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program.WorldGenStateWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper for WorldGenState to work with GameState system.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program.WorldMapStateWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper for WorldMapState to work with GameState system.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Program.EmbarkPrepStateWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper for EmbarkPrepState to work with GameState system.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.Rendering.NavigationOverlay
member.summary: Debug overlay for visualizing navigation data.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.TestRunner
member.summary: Test runner to verify Phase A implementation.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.BuildUI
member.summary: Renders the Build quick menu with L2 submenus (no L3 for now).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.MapScreenSurface
member.summary: ScreenSurface specialized for the map area that exposes reliable mouse events for hover and left-click in local cell coordinates.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.OrdersUI
member.summary: Renders the Orders quick menu and haul submenu. Minimal v1: shows keys Z→F→Z and status messages during placement.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileQuickUI
member.summary: Renders the Stockpile quick menu (V button). Migrated from Zones (X) stockpile functionality.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI
member.summary: UI handler for stockpile zones. Manages creation, editing, deletion, and visualization.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.DrawZoneMenu(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draw zone menu (after X -> Z).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.DrawStockpileMenu(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Draw stockpile submenu (after X -> Z -> Z).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.DrawPlacementMode(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,HumanFortress.App.UI.UiStore,SadRogue.Primitives.Point)
member.summary: Draw placement mode UI.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.DrawPresetSelection(SadConsole.ScreenSurface)
member.summary: Draw preset selection menu.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.DrawEditPopup(SadConsole.ScreenSurface)
member.summary: Draw edit popup for a stockpile.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.RenderOverlay(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World,System.Int32,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle)
member.summary: Render stockpile overlays on the map.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.RenderPlacementPreview(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Render preview rectangle during placement.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.HandleStockpileClick(SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World)
member.summary: Handle click on stockpile for editing.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.HandlePresetSelection(System.Int32)
member.summary: Handle preset selection input.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.StockpileUI.StockpileVisual
member.summary: Visual state for a stockpile zone.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.UiOverlaySurface
member.summary: Full-screen UI overlay surface that captures mouse in overlay coordinates.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI
member.summary: Renders the Zones quick menu with L2 and L3 submenus, zone overlay, and detail popup.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.GetZoneDefIdFromKey(HumanFortress.App.UI.ZoneSubmenu,System.Char)
member.summary: Try to get zone definition ID from keyboard input.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.DrawPlacementMode(SadConsole.ScreenSurface,HumanFortress.App.UI.UiStore,SadRogue.Primitives.Point)
member.summary: Draw placement mode prompt.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.RenderPlacementPreview(HumanFortress.App.UI.MapScreenSurface,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Render placement preview on map (only when zone menu is open).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.RenderOverlay(HumanFortress.App.UI.MapScreenSurface,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World,System.Int32,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Render zone overlay on map (only when zone menu is open).

member.summary: Draw zone detail popup.

member.summary: Open zone detail popup.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.CloseDetailPopup
member.summary: Close zone detail popup.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.App.UI.ZonesUI.IsDetailPopupOpen
member.summary: Check if detail popup is open.
